bundle_name: M3 closure -- runtime log rotation + L2 closure -- ReconcileStats windowed max
theme: Closes M3 + L2 from the v0.1.64 Red Team review of v0.1.63 R1. M3: at the v0.1.65 1s tick cadence the runtime log grows ~2-8 GB/month uncapped; an Apex eval VM hitting its disk quota is a preventable infrastructure-only failure mode. v0.1.67 adds RuntimeLogRotator with size-triggered rotation (default 100 MB) + age-based gzip (default 24h) + retention prune (default 30d). ApexRuntime constructs a default rotator bound to cfg.log_path and calls rotator.run() every Nth tick (default 600 = ~10 min at 1s cadence). L2: ReconcileStats.max_drift_usd_abs is lifetime-only -- a single early-eval spike pollutes the metric forever. Adds drift_window_size (default 1000) + windowed_max_drift_usd_abs that ages out stale spikes via a bounded deque. The lifetime max stays for forensics; the windowed value gives the H1 calibration harness (when it ships) a moving statistic.
modules_edited: core/runtime_log_rotator.py: NEW -- RuntimeLogRotator class with maybe_rotate / gzip_aged / prune_aged / run methods; pure-stdlib (gzip + shutil + pathlib); idempotent on every leg; same-second collision handling; bounds validation in __init__ (rotate_at_size_bytes > 0; gzip_after_age <= retain_age); RotatorStats counters

scripts/run_eta_live.py: import RuntimeLogRotator + thread runtime_log_rotator kwarg through ApexRuntime.__init__; default constructed when omitted (bound to cfg.log_path); runtime_log_rotate_every_n_ticks=600 attribute; tick loop calls rotator.run() every Nth tick + emits a 'log_rotation' kind entry to the runtime log when any of rotated/gzipped/pruned is non-empty

core/broker_equity_reconciler.py: ReconcileStats gains windowed_max_drift_usd_abs + drift_window_size; constructor adds drift_window_size kwarg (default 1000) with bounds validation; collections.deque(maxlen=N) tracks last N drift_abs values; reconcile() updates both lifetime max and windowed max; no_broker_data ticks do not pollute the window

tests/test_runtime_log_rotator.py: NEW -- 20 tests covering constructor validation (5), size-triggered rotation (4), gzip aging (3), retention prune (2), run() composition (1), stats (2), edge cases (2), with monkeypatched mtimes for age-based behaviour
tests/test_broker_equity_reconciler.py: TestWindowedMaxDrift (6 tests) covering default size, negative rejection, size=0 disable, growth-then-cap, age-out behaviour, no_broker_data isolation
tests/test_run_eta_live.py: TestRuntimeLogRotatorWiring (4 tests) covering default construction, explicit kwarg override, size-triggered rotation through the live runtime, log_rotation event emission
deferred_followups: B3 BLOCKER -- tier-A aggregate equity invariant (needs design call on per-account vs per-fleet equity aggregation)
H1 -- tolerance calibration harness (gated on collected drift histogram from live-paper -- L2 windowed_max now gives the harness a moving stat)
M2 -- KillVerdict synthesis on sustained drift (gated on H1 empirics)
L1 -- adapter name uniqueness (accepted as not a bug under single-account today)
Process gap 2 -- exit criteria for 'deferred to v0.2.x' claims
milestone_title: M3 closure (RuntimeLogRotator -- size + age + retention) + L2 closure (ReconcileStats windowed max). The runtime log can no longer grow unbounded; the H1 calibration harness now has a moving-window drift stat to consume.
